title: hieracium scorzonerifolium subsp. pseudoscorzonerifolium
intro: Hieracium scorzonerifolium subsp. pseudoscorzonerifolium, also known as Hawkweed or False Hawkweed, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health issues such as wounds, skin conditions, and gastrointestinal problems. The health benefits of Hieracium scorzonerifolium subsp. pseudoscorzonerifolium include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be applied topically as a poultice or salve to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
